[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Jun 27, 2013 4:02 am News about 4.0 will show up when it does. Keep looking for news in every little corner of the internet & you're gonna go loco. Be patient. Go read a book or paint a painting. Something non-Eva & before you know it 4.0 will be here. I've gone through college, worked on various films - both mine & others - traveled the world & been in my fair share of relationships - both good & bad - while these movies have been made. They take a while but they are a pleasant gift when they do arrive. Basically, stop waiting for it & the movie will get here faster.

[]: Post by Sgt. Griff » Thu Jun 27, 2013 4:12 am Wait. Gendo doesn't shave. THIS IS RIDUNKULOUS. And so the topic is summed up.
